title: GitHub trending: Graphify-Labs/graphify
whyItMatters: Star Graphify-Labs / graphify AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph. · Language: Python
